paneContent:
‚óè Create analysis markdown widget on canvas (shell)
  ‚îÇ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget
  ‚îÇ 
  ‚îÇ cat > /tmp/collision-analysis.json << 'PROPS'
  ‚îÇ {"content":"# Collision Detection Gap Analysis\n\n## What exists today\n\n| Layer |
  ‚îÇ Collision Awareness | Status |\n|-------|-------------------|--------|\n| ‚Ä¶
  ‚îî 49 lines...

‚óè Here's the summary:

  The collision module (resolvePosition, findFreePosition) exists and works ‚Äî but it's
  JavaScript-only. Neither the POST /widget server endpoint nor the canvas add CLI call
  it. Agents use CLI/API, so the collision detection is unreachable.

  Three fixes ranked by impact:

   1. --near CLI flag (high impact) ‚Äî canvas add --near widget-id --direction top-right
   ‚Äî agents never do manual position math
   2. resolve server flag (high impact) ‚Äî POST /widget with { resolve: true } runs
  resolvePosition server-side before persisting
   3. Better agent instructions (medium) ‚Äî tell agents to read their own bounds first
  via canvas bounds --id $STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID

  The first two prevent this class of bug entirely. The third is a band-aid. Full
  analysis is on the canvas ‚Üí

 ~/workspace/st... [‚éá 4.3.0--prompt-widget*%]             @terminal-pdmkx8.snapshot.json
